reviews.review_description:
This is going to be a bit of a story but here we go... I'm a 46 year old mom to 5 kids and I've still got 2 minors left at home. All the kids have tried over the years to get this old mom into gaming -unsucessfully- until the oculus. The first game I tried was walkabout and since then, I've purchased every single DLC course available. I'm grateful for the game. I'm disabled now and can't travel or play real golf the way I would like. This app brings me back everything that's been lost with age and time. I slip on this headset and instantly I'm in world of no stresses. The burdens of finances and the pain of my body quiets. I'm whereever I want to be. 

This game has actually worked in place of pain medications. If you don't believe me, next time you're dealing with something that's weighing your spirit down, try this game. ❤️

I have always enjoyed mini golf in real life, so to have this experience, with the fantastical courses, has been nothing but pure joy for me.  I love that anybody can play it - from my teenage son to my non-gamer wife.  Not all courses are created equal, but I dare you not to find a few courses that you won't absolutely love.

I loved this game for the first several months of having it, but will be uninstalling it from headset. Way too many glitches in the game now. I am left-handed and was set up that way but a couple of months ago the game has changed it to right-handed player and I can’t switch it back. Trying to teleport the club gets stuck on in retrieve ball mode and unable to move at all. Game needs serious updating and ability to either play left or right handed.

Haven't played the game in awhile and out of the blue my wife wanted to play and low and behold we can't end up in the same place cause some but head had to go and upgrade and switch things around and make it more difficult to just hookup and play the game why can't people just leave things alone they need to update and mess it up,love the game would love it even more if I could get my wife in my private room

reviews.review_title: Great game but DLC price rises suck
reviews.review_description:
The game probably needs no introduction and the key to its longevity is the regular release of new courses.

However, the price of the new courses seems to have risen quite a bit since I bought the game.

Before, i would buy any course that was released because the price was reasonable. At nearly 5 euro for a new course, it has been a deciding factor that I have not bought the last three. That's almost €15 of income from a regular user that the company are missing, which is a netloss for them.

The reason I haven't bought the courses is because they are just not as enjoyable so I only buy a course if it's really hitting the spot. If I do play them, it's on a guestpass from a friend's account.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest review. We appreciate any support from our players, but we also do not expect you to buy every single course that comes out. Any support you can offer is appreciated all the same. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: It was rhe first game I played in VR, I normally have really bad motion sickness and this game helped tremendously with get my VR legs.  It is a great game to play with friends, love that new maps come pit frequently and we always play the day they come out!   Keep up the great work, i look forward to every new map and special effects. Love the dark crystal add on

reviews.review_title: This is the best game on Meta 3
reviews.review_description: I love this game. I play it practically everyday. The developers are awesome with all of the new add ons they keep coming up with. This game is the reason why I got a backup battery head harness.  If you get this game I promise you will spend hours enjoying yourself. It's not just mini golf either there are tons of fun side games available.

reviews.review_title: No better option for hanging out
reviews.review_description:
I used to think that it was really stupid how movies depicted businessmen constantly golfing, until I played this game. Golf allows you the perfect level of activity to encourage conversation without interfering with it. If you want to get quality time to catch up with friends, family, or even complete strangers, this is possibly the most important game you could possibly purchase.
Walkabout mini golf takes out every single inconvenience of golf, while providing a constantly increasing selection of some of the most beautiful, interesting, and conceptually eclectic courses imaginable. Never have to go chasing after a ball, never have to fish out a water hazard, always have a club that is the perfect length for you, never have to worry about someone else's ball hitting your own, never have equipment or courses that are damaged or degraded (unless they are meant to be) never worry about the weather being too hot, cold, rainy, windy, etc, never get more tired walking than you want to, all without any extra rental or ball fees, no gas costs or time spent driving, all from the comfort of your home in as little as 3x3ft of space(less if you're careful) 
Through all that, walkabout's courses are constantly crushing the boundaries of what would be feasible for any mini golf course to do, and yet constantly retaining the premise of a course that COULD conceivably be navigated in reality (just not in front of my osha handbook) the base game comes with 14 incredible courses,(28 if you count the hard modes separate) and another 26+ that are roughly $4-$5 each(sales/bundles can bring that price down) this means that you could potentially sink over $100 into this game.

That sounds like a massive investment, but when you compare that to the cost of going to a single mini golf course for even just 2 or 3 people ONCE, you're looking at almost half that price just on the singular course fee alone for what are typically generic courses without any theme or story. Every single course you buy in walkabout can be shared with ANYONE you play with, and are beautifully hand crafted with a unique setting, theme, and storyline.
Each also comes with 18 custom-themed balls that are hidden like Easter eggs through the easy course, at least 1 custom putter that can be unlocked through a foxhunt in the hard course (which itself is unlocked either by scoring under par in easy mode or collecting 10 balls) and several courses have extra gimmicks, like slingshot target practice or even places to play chess.
You can play any course you own as many times as you want for no additional fee. Play 4 times, and you've basically already saved compared to going to a real world mini golf course.

The stationary vr aspect also makes it one of the most accessible vr experiences with almost zero chance of causing nausea in newer players.
There's even an "internship" program that doesn't require any of the dlc, and can get you bonuses like faster flight, lost ball radar, and even little music notes player for completing tasks like catching bugs, cleaning leaves, and other silly nonsense. If you love golf, you'll love this game, and if you don't love golf, you still have a good chance of liking this game regardless.

I have been playing this app with my mom for a few years now. I love all of the add-on courses. I think it's so creative, there are always different course features, so it's a good challenge and very interesting to play. I would definitely recommend to anyone who enjoys mini golf, either solo or with a friend!

So many levels and they keep adding more of them. Great ball physics and so much to do and try different modes and the levels are way different compared to easy and hard mode. Hours and hours of fun time and the best part is that if you own every map then your friend can also play the bought levels even if they dont own them.

Me and my mom or dad play with each other all the time it is crazy with all the different maps. You can go in and it is for all different ages. This game is one of the best time wasters and is calming my dad is so bad at saving money cuz he bought almost every map.

reviews.review_title: Most detailed game I have ever played
reviews.review_description: From all of the courses to the lost balls and the fox hunts, Walkabout has put thought and effort into every part of the game. My favorite feature by far is the CocoNET secret employee program. I’ve spent weeks completing all the tasks with my friends and it’s such a fun Easter egg. Five ⭐️’s, walkabout

I really love this game, but after the recent update, I can no longer open it at all. It keeps showing "not responding." I’ve seen many other players in the reviews experiencing the exact same issue.
Why hasn’t the developer fixed this bug or responded to the feedback? I have purchased a lot of DLCs and would really like to continue playing. Please take this issue seriously and fix it as soon as possible.

developer_response.body:
Please reach out to us directly on our support site: https://support.mightycoconut.com/new/ 

Our support team can help you troubleshoot this issue and escalate to our QA team if necessary.

reviews.review_description:
If you’re looking for truly the best game on Meta look no further.  Walkabout mini golf does it all.  All the courses are visually stimulating, there are hidden bonuses (finding lost balls) and plenty of free/included courses plus more to purchase if you want even more fun.  

AND, you can play against a random opponent on a random course, so much fun.  

Geometrically I don’t know how they did it but all the angles, speed and force seem so perfect, the only thing missing is the small nudge you feel when tapping your ball.  

Some courses even have wind effect which affects the ball so you have to be creative for some shots.  

This is hands down my favorite game on Meta!

reviews.review_title: Gets better all of the time
reviews.review_description:
Long term fan. Family is all over the country and we make sure to play every course. Low barrier for entry and those with higher skill have the challenge of trick shots. There has yet to be a course I don’t like but most I really love. I can’t recommend this game enough. The team behind Walkabout is incredible and new courses are affordable. When some family members don’t have a specific course, we can still play the course I own together, allowing us to play more frequently. 

TLDR: it’s great.

If this was the only game available for Oculus, it would be worth buying a headset just to play it. The add-on courses are inexpensive and I always buy them as soon as they’re available. Lots of cookies in every course makes them fun to continue to explore and they remain playable even after you’ve played them for years, as I have. To the developers - how about adding a hidden “special” hole somewhere in the map as a surprise bonus for people who spend the time to really explore the level? Just a suggestion……

Dear Team,

I would like to express my disappointment with the recent Quick Match mode update. As someone who has been playing the game since the beginning, I find the new system extremely frustrating and limiting.

The constant rotation of game options every hour removes player choice instead of improving the experience. Many experienced players, including myself, would strongly prefer the ability to decide how we want to play rather than being restricted to temporary rotating modes.

Features that would greatly improve the experience include:

A proper ranking system
The ability to choose specific game modes
Open lobbies where players can wait for others to join, 2,3,4,5 players...
These are standard features that many long-term players value and expect.

Because of these changes, I will be lowering my rating to 3 stars for now. However, I would gladly return to a 5-star rating when we have a proper rankings and quick match modes.

Thank you for taking the time to read this feedback.

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving this detailed feedback on our updated Quick Match system. We will continue to make improvements to the game and are open to ideas such as yours here.

reviews.review_description: Great game iv bought every DLC play most weeks BUT recent up date now won't allow my to host a game without all parties owning the DLC'S never had a problem in the past. Before I could be the host and invite guests. For this reason its a 3 start. If it goes back to how it was 5 star without a doubt

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and supporting Walkabout Mini Golf! We're sorry to hear you've encountered an issue with our guest pass feature. We haven't changed anything on our end, but perhaps there's been a change from Meta. Please reach out to us at https://support.mightycoconut.com/home/ and create a ticket so we can help get to the bottom of this issue for you!

reviews.review_description: I've bought a lot of games, except for this one, because there was always something more interesting. But when the Labyrinth DLC (my favorite childhood movie) came out, I had no doubts about buying it. It was a great decision, because it's an exciting, fun and relaxing game with lots of exploration in different environments. Even if you don't feel like playing golf, it's still great fun to wander around and explore the diverse and fascinating environments. The graphics are simple but beautiful. The music, sounds and atmosphere are excellent. There's a lot of replayability. You can play golf, look for hidden balls, objects, secret doors, shoot targets with a slingshot, play chess among the branches of a Christmas tree, or meditate under a waterfall. There are many free environments, but you won't be able to resist buying the paid DLCs either. Tip: Point the putter towards the sky and push the stick forward. After 1-2 seconds, the flying mode will activate. This way you can get to places where you can't teleport. This is great fun too. :) To collect the balls and objects you find, pull the stick towards you.

Xtra Input: I do want to add that the Alice In Wonderland putter was so disappointing. A flamingo, really!?! After all the details and work out into this game, why in the world would y'all give us something so plain!? U could've made the putter to have the mad hatter's hat on top, the drink me bottle, a cupcake and a few other things to make up the putter. And at the bottom u could've put the Cheshire cats smile.  So many things could've been done to make that putter special. Still love the game, but very disappointed with that part. Just sayin'.


Original Review: Absolutely love love love this! So much fun. Love the fun and creative courses. The only thing I would like improved is smoother looking graphics when you're actually on the course. Like how they are when you preview and see the whole course. I think it can be a bit less block-like. But even as is, I still love it!

This mini golf is one of my most played games. It has a bunch of different courses, all having both a great theme and unique hole design. 
Not much else to say other than it is an absolute joy to play. Great job!

reviews.review_title: Blokhaven is the worst DLC so far
reviews.review_description:
I love this game.  It has become my go to game for quick gaming fix or to wind down. It is fun, challenging and relaxing all at the same time. 

It is one of the best multiplayer games as you actually have time to talk and tease each other. It is really a good game to hang out with people, rather than a frantic stressful shooter. 

The easy day courses have hidden balls on each hole and the harder night courses have a treasure hunt which rewards you with new putters. This extends the replayability in a really nice way.

 I have owned this game since launch and bought every DLC on the day they drop. 

The DLC courses are amazing. They all look great and are well worth the money.....

......except for Blokhaven. It is the least inspiring and notup to the high standard we have come to expect. It feels like very little effort was made to design this course compared the the rest. I got bored for the first time in walkabout playing this  I even hate the music. I doubt if I will play this course again once I have collected and balls and putter. 


However, the rest are amazing. 
Essential!  Recommended!

This has to be the best game on vr RIGHT now the visuals are so so so so so so good and there are a lot of maps to play. Plus if your friends own this game then you can play with them and it’s super fun. Thanks for a good game on vr 😁

It was great when I first downloaded it. I love the game! But the last few times I've been having trouble getting it to come up. It keeps coming up saying not responding. If it wasn't for that it would be 5 stars no doubt

developer_response.body:
Please reach out to us directly on our support site by creating a ticket: https://support.mightycoconut.com/new/ 

Our support team can help you troubleshoot this issue and escalate to our QA team if necessary.

reviews.review_description: Some of these courses are great, but with a world of possibilities available, it often limits itself to feel too much like a standard mini golf course in the real world. Every course should do wild things that can only exist in the game world and characters, obstacles, and their corresponding animations should be more immersive.

Updated the game fully & bought the course, started the game up and it says i need to buy the course,,, (blokhaven) on Quest 3, it might only be £4 but its still money that they have taken & not given me my purchase,,, MC is one of the worst companies, the good people who used to run it are Long Gone,

developer_response.body: Sorry to see you've run into an issue with the Blokhaven release. Reach out to us at https://support.mightycoconut.com/new/ with more details so we can help you get this sorted out.

reviews.review_description:
A truly wonderful game that I never tire of. Six new courses a year, each the price of a beer. What else can you get at that price that lasts this long?

Playing this game online has helped a friend conquer his fear of people he doesn't know that well, helping him greatly in his life.

Top marks Mighty Coconut

reviews.review_title: I bought the Quest 3 for this!
reviews.review_description: Well.. and a few other games. But, I love this game so much, its the best to play and if the quest 3 only had this game, id still buy it! Please add a ranked system! Quick matches are fun, but maybe add a 3-4 tier ranking system and ability to see all time stats with wins and losses. GREAT JOB DEVELOPERS!

reviews.review_title: Best App on the Oculus by a long shot!
reviews.review_description:
This game helped me stay in touch with my brother during Covid. We were able to chat and socialize while playing.
You will see complaints about the "paid upgrades". It's nonsense. When I bought the game initially they had already released one new course for free, and then two subsequent ones. So overall we had about 6 or 7 free courses, two versions of each. Now as they develop them it costs $4CDN to buy a new set of two courses, which is a tiny amount for the entertainment value. I don't expect them to keep providing new content for free, and nobody else should either. The cost of the game, and what you get is more than enough value. The add-ons are there ONLY if you want them. Don't buy them if you don't. There are plenty of other free upgrades being added constantly. 
This game is what VR was made for. The physics is excellent, and the latency between players is very small. I highly, highly recommend it.

reviews.review_title: I have to keep spending money...
reviews.review_description: I got a pack of several people to purchase the whole in one package... we play almost daily.   So I/we pay top dollar and a new course comes out and it's an add on.  I'd have to buy it.  That's crazy,  we are almost done collecting everything and now to continue,  we have to continue to BUY in order to keep playing.   This is crazy.   I even have horizon plus but I have to keep spending money.

Great game I play few times a week with my mother and Nephews that are 1000km away. Quality time with them thanks to this enjoyable game. 
Allways expecting new courses. 

P.d: an option to uninstall some courses would be great as this game is growing in space and headsets have limited space.

Fantastic physics, fun visuals, many courses, online multiplayer, treasure hunts, unique balls and clubs.
If you’ve ever liked mini-golf or VR, then you obviously you already own Walkabout Mini-Golf.

One of my favorite games. All the courses are so well thought of. I like the different levels of challenge for each course. Some are easier than others, some take great skill. People complaining about the price shouldn't. $4.99 for a new course you get to play over and over isn't bad at all. If you were to go to a real course it would cost you more and you usually can't play then over and over. Plus love the hunts for balls and the fix hunt for new clubs. Can't wait for the next course!

reviews.review_title: Great for beginners, glitches galore tho
reviews.review_description: Fun generally relaxing game, but has inconsistent physics and situations where it will “time out” your shot and give you a stroke even when in bounds or still in motion. A lot

Bought some more DLC and haven’t been able to play the game the last few days. Tried clearing the cache, uninstalling and reinstalling, force resetting, etc and nothing works. Everything is up to date as well. Please fix.

developer_response.body:
Please reach out to us directly on our support site by creating a ticket: https://support.mightycoconut.com/new/ 

Our support team can help you troubleshoot this issue and escalate to our QA team if necessary.

reviews.review_description:
Can’t say enough good stuff about this game. It is our family (getaway) our grandson was born with a lot of medical issues and is in the children’s hospital in Cincinnati. His mother stays in the McDonald house. Every week we so look forward to meeting up in walkabout mini golf so we can have a little bit of well earned fun. It’s become a great way to close the miles between us. So glad we got this game, it’s as close as you can get without picking up a real putter. 
Thank you Mighty Coconut, keep doing what you do and we will keep swinging.

One of the very first games I got for the Quest 3 and it is so much fun I wish others were like this.  Very easy to get into but still tricky to master,  it's just a shame that there aren't more courses but that's just me being greedy!

Ive been going to the local football field, hotspotting the headset to the cellphone, turning off boundary in developer settings. Using irl movements through the courses instead of control sticks is waaaaay better. I highly recommend this way to play also convinced that is what the devs had in mind when naming it "walkabout" 

Only thing is you'll need to push down on your control stick when traversing elevations but other than that, its much more immersive playing this way.

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Apps on MetaQuest
reviews.review_description: This game pretty much alone keeps me coming back to the MetaQuest nearly weekly to play with family and friends. Fantastic maps with tons of fun to be had. Always a fun challenge where any hole could make or break your victory.

reviews.review_title: Please introduce a start over option!!!
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely amazing, best game on VR, addictive 😃
Every single course is great fun and offers something different. A must buy for every Quest user.

PLEASE PLEASE INTRODUCE A START OVER OPTION, I asked before but no update, is it that hard! 

@Developers please please introduce an option that allows you to restart the course without having to go back to the Main Menu and reselect the course again!

reviews.review_title: Best Social Experience on Meta Quest
reviews.review_description:
We have a had a weekly game with friends since the game came out. We have all moved thousands of miles away and still play every week.
Seeing each person’s Avatar with excellent mouth movement to voice synchronization; it all makes us feel like we actually see one another frequently. 

Every pack that comes out we get; all of us, everyone. It is reasonably priced and I hope it stays. We spend less on this than if we went mini-golfing in person. 

The request or suggestion I have is for replays; that they would allow you to save replays to holes. So I can save my favorite (3) shot for a hole to show them off to friends when we are playing
or replay history on the current hole. So when my friends wants to see my replay and I’ve taken my next shot I can still show them it.

Kudos to the level design teams. I’d love to create levels for them. Beautiful work.
Great fun and social hub, lots of great fun people, relaxing!!!😌

Immersive, beautiful, smooth, Amazing balle physic, chill music, multiplayer, still DLC in the futur, i love it. Flying mode is pretty fantastic.

Update 10/03/2023:
this game is still amazing, always new sublime maps, polygon style graphics are highlighted it's so beautiful that for me it's art. it's not just a game of mini golf, these paintings are also a trip to another world so relaxing, being able to fly away and follow the birds in the sky is a magical experience and what about the music which contributes to this incredible atmosphere. the developers are real artists. Congratulations to them. You absolutely have to own this incredible game, you won't regret it believe me.

Update 26/03/2026 
Still amazing,  DLC  are fantastics , great job devs

reviews.review_title: The pinnacle of mini golf in VR
reviews.review_description: As everything these days prices go up, however, it is all relative. We spend maybe 3 to 4 hours a month playing this game and it makes our day, £1.00 per hour of fun, is not bad for most of the courses. But this will soon add up if you want every course. This is bar far the standard of mini golf on VR, and considering it is nearly £60 quid excluding travel to play in real life at a local place, which is always packed...this is my perfered meduim to play mini golf.

So, this game is a go to for my friend and I. We love playing together on this game every weekend. This weekend we decided to start a “Race Mode” only competition. If there is one thing I can say about that mode is that it is extremely frustrating! When you are in a race, there is nothing more frustrating than having to wait for your ball to appear after you fall off the puttable surface. If you could make it fair by putting the ball back as soon as you are out of play, instead of having to wait while your ball drops off the playable surface and bounces around, that would be great. I know everyone has the same problem if it happens, but it makes the mode so much less enjoyable. 
Please make it so if your ball goes out of play IMMEDIATELY available. It’s bad enough that you wait for another shot, but to have your ball bouncing around an unplayable surface while your buddy continues to putt is frustrating! I think the ball should be put right back for another shot to make it fair. You already lose time for a bad shot. It shouldn’t add 10 seconds for you to get your ball back for another shot. That has cost me so many competitions it’s crazy!
Please consider fixing this pointless delay. I turn into a truck driver, foul mouthed heathen when that happens. I just hate losing because of a video game delay. 
Thank you!
This game is amazing, every map has so much thought put into it, every club has the perfect amount of detail, don’t forget the game is so much fun too. 10/10 game

I love this game it's my favorite game on the meta quest I just wish you guys would add a option you take holes from different courses and create our own 18 hole course and a design your own putter and ball and maybe add new hidden balls in the lobby or somewhere and add some power ups like on planet mini golf on ps system like a control your ball power up and a skip a turn and a take another shot and one that makes the ball super heavy or super lite and one that switches spots with one of your opponents and one that makes your ball on fire or ice , your ball will explode on the next shot, one where you can make your ball jump one that gives you like 5 or 10 seconds to shot as many times as you can so many possibilities but other than that it's a great game oh ya you guys should add a music player to so we can listen to music while we play 🙅 just saying 🥰

I was introduced to this game a few years ago by my brother and I would say it was the best purchase I’ve commited to on VR. I love playing mini golf especially with my brother, and sense he lives a state away, it’s possible over VR. the visuals are absolutely stunning and incredible and I LOVE all the maps! Theyve got over 20 different maps you can chose from(many you have to pay for) but the prices are decent and I love finding new balls, and following the fox hunts to get special putters! Each map is unique, fun, and has many exciting and interesting elements and holes you can play on. I also love the avatars and how you can change them around, and you can also get specific avatars from the map purchases. Such a￼s Wallace and Gromit, and the Muppets. If you really love mini golf, and spending time with friends, I TOTALLY recommend this app. You can play with up to 8 players, create your own room, and you can customize the rounds so sometimes it’s a race, practice mode, Back 9, or regular. I overall love this game because it’s soooo fun playing with all my friends and cousins, and the maps are so PRETTY!! I know the animators and developers put SO much effort into this, so when I’m waiting for a new map to come up, I’ll always so excited what new map they’re planning to release!! They just released a HollyWood map and let’s just say I wasn’t disappointed!! If you get this app you’ll be mind blow by how well thought out and amazing these courses are. It’s fantastic how well done the maps are. TYSM for making such an amazing game!!!!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on meta
reviews.review_description: What an amazing game love the maps its a good giggle with your mates android version you promised would be nice not just apple phone's and chess?? Random I've got every map you've made and am w8ting for more to come bloody good game this is like well dun devs
A must have for quest owners. Endless replay ability and each time you hop into a map you are guaranteed to see something you hadn’t noticed before. Loads of fun, runs butter smooth and looks great

One of the best designed (if not the best) VR games I've tried (out of dozens). This is my go to game when I want a nice relaxing, but challenging, game that I can play on my own or with friends. We frequently play this after playing an adrenalin rush game for a few hours and need to wind down a bit.  The controls are super simple, but the game play can be simple or quite complex depending on your course and settings choices. It just does not get better than this!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games for quest
reviews.review_description:
This is easily one of the best games on the Meta Horizon store. The physics are spot on—it actually feels like you're holding a real putter—and the graphics are clean and beautifully designed. I love how easy the controls are to master, making it accessible for everyone from young kids to adults.
​The multiplayer is where the game really shines; it’s a fantastic way to meet new people or just hang out and pot a few holes with buddies. I also love that they offer the 'Whole In One' bundle so you can grab all the available maps in one go. It’s an incredible value for the amount of content you get. Highly recommended!

reviews.review_title: Amazing bonding experience with my niece
reviews.review_description: What a cool game! Very quick to learn, awesome courses, and the first VR game I really was impressed with. I had an amazing time playing mini golf with my niece and it was such a fun bonding experience. She’s 12, I’m 42, and lives far away, but it felt like the 2 of of us were on a real course together and chatting away while we were playing. Amazing bonding experience. Wonderful job and highly recommend!!!

reviews.review_title: My dream game, im happy that i bought it
reviews.review_description: I love it
Revising my review as they have cleaned up a lot of issues I was disappointed with. This is the best game ever made. Period.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for updating your review here! We're glad to hear you've enjoyed the recent update!

reviews.review_title: Love it! Like going to a theme park!
reviews.review_description:
I have my father-in-law and nephews on to play with my daughter and I. We have a Quest 2 & 3 here, so we frequently play with guests. I play with my father-in-law every week, so we keep in touch without phone calls. FaceTime with kids is not great, but in here they’re just like themselves, except they can fly. Though we moved far away from my nephews, we still get to hang out 2-4 times a month.

The course design started strong and keeps getting better. We used to live close to Disneyland and would go a bunch. This fills that hole for a lot less money. Love it! Highly recommend!
the game will glitch and sent the ball flying even though i didn’t hit it, also the club and my hands will start randomly floating, last the game is really glitchy even on good internet
Love this game with friends.  Loads of courses and so much fun.  Best drinking game 😂😂😂

Absolutely deserves the positivity! Adore this game and as a Brit, I have a wide smile on my face being inside Wallace and Gromit's house! The courses are creative and inventive - I just wish I was better!
Been playing since the apps release and it helped me get thru the pandemic!
Fun game to play solo or with friends.  Play's perfectly online with no issues.

This is just as fun as the real thing in my opinion when playing with friends. Some possible points..make teams like 2 vs 2 like scramble using nest shot of each team per hole. More interactive elements in the map, like adding simple emojis, thumbs up, claps , or boos. Interactive elements like interacting with some elements of the environment and possibly a mulligan option, one per 9 holes or something. Lastly, maybe a zoo map. Awesome game

I’m not much of a golfer or putt putt player in real life, but Walkabout takes the putt putt game to the next level with its creative, artistic, charming scenic locations.  The simulation is spot on (especially with a club attachment for the controller) and the sound effects and background music brings extra immersion.  Looking for lost balls, solving fox hunts, and playing multiplayer with family and friends are all fantastic.  It’s also great that the developer regularly offers new DLC add-ons, each one is well worth owning since every course has its own character and charm.  Walkabout is simply awesome!

reviews.review_title: The only reason I kept my meta headset
reviews.review_description: I'd say this is the absolute best game I've played so far. I definitely plan on getting every pack eventually.

Amazing game all around.

would like to see custom maps

When I bought my Quest I was looking for games like Beat saber (still a very good game!!) or escape room games. I liked the idea of mini golf, especiallly after reading the reviews, but I thought I would not fall in love with it. I am not the kind of person that likes golf for example and mini golf in real life is not something I am thrilled about doing.
But, my first game of mini golf here was fantastic! I learned that in every 'easy' level, there were balls to be found with every hole, so, my love for seek and find was triggered in a good way!. It is not as easy as you might think, so sometimes I was searching and my husband was guiding me along while watching Innerprincess VR on YT. Every 'hard' level, has a fox hunt. LOVE it. 
The atmospheres of the games are really relaxing, so sometimes I come in a game, just to sit there and do nothing, so it is also very meditative for me. This Christmas, there was a Christmas variant of the game. Please.....my heart! I am not the kind of person that likes shooter games, zombies or time pressured games, so this is the perfect game for me. The only thing that I can tell that I am not liking, is that new enviroments are not coming fast enough 😉 but I understand that is totally my problem and nobody elses. 
After buying a Quest 3, my husband now uses my Quest 2 so we can play together and on mondays, we have a a third party that joins us. I can not rave about it enough!

reviews.review_title: Getting too expensive for add ons
reviews.review_description: Great game however the increased price the courses are now too expensive.
Best game ever.

This is my absolute favorite game to play on my Quest Headset. Fun for all ages!! I love a game that includes exploring and fun hidden gems. This game has it all. From the amazing themed levels to the missing balls and Fox hunts. One of my favorite things to do in some of the levels is ride the trains, boats, coasters, animals, etc in the levels to get a real feel for the atmosphere. My newest favorite level was the Alice in Wonderland themed level. I being a HUGE Disney and storybook fan thought it was so cool to enter Wonderland. If possible I want them to make even more of these types of levels. Well known stories that fans (like myself) get to actually walk through!!

I play this game with my sister on the other side of the country.  It's great, like she's right there in the room with me.  We absolutely love the foxhunts; we've only had to use the "Pro Tips " a few times and then only after trying for at least half an hour.  They are not too hard,  but not too easy either.  It really makes you think, which is good for us older folks. The designers need to get busy though as we only have four places to finish,  including the latest DLC Hollywood. Keep up the great work, this game allows us to have a lot of fun,  keep our minds sharp,  and stay connected when we are many miles away.

This is for me the sole reason that meta Quest was made. I get to have fun with my friends and family,  one of which lives abroad. The likes of Skype and zoom etc are ok but not engaging in the same fun way. The courses are very well thought out and the physics are excellent. It offers excellent value for money giving us a new course on average every 6-8 weeks for less than half the cost of a coffee. This game is the best reason for the Metaquest to exist.

I didn’t think a mini golf game would be my favorite game ever, but it is. Been playing for years with 2 friends. It’s so addictive, so fun, can be relaxing. I play almost daily trying to get lower scores. The environments are detailed and beautiful even though they are low polygon. I can’t recommend this game enough.

reviews.review_title: The more you play, the more you love it
reviews.review_description: I love the extras as much as the game - finding lost balls, completing the foxhunt and staff entrance challenges are great. I am frustrated that I am unable to find the "Whole in One" bundle to purchase additional content though!

I love that the "Hole in One" bundle is prorated so that you can buy more of the courses for the same discounted prices. I have never seen another company do this and I think it is really nice. The game and it's community are delightful!

I don’t usually write game review s, but this game is so good I can’t help myself. My wife and I love this game! We play it almost every night. We own all of the courses, and we always look forward to the next one coming out. The courses are fun, challenging, and very entertaining. I’m not a great golfer, but I think the putting is very realistic. If you haven’t tried this game, do yourself a favor and buy it right now. 😊

reviews.review_title: The reason my Quest is still around
reviews.review_description:
This game is one of the only reasons we keep our two Quest 3s around. It's so immersive and fun, great for just kinda hanging out and catching up, and the mechanics feel great to top it off. 

I'll keep buying whatever courses you put out because I can't thank you enough for such a fun experience.

When I bought my quest 3 vr headset I had no idea I would be playing mini-golf! It is easily my most played game. It's more than just mini-golf!  Lost balls to find, riddles to solve and quest to fulfill.  This game got my friend hooked an he bought his own Quest 3! As long as they keep releasing new courses, we'll continue to be a loyal customeris! Thank you 😀
Good fun in groups.

You can tell that the developers take pride in their product. Not only do you get 18 hole, you get 18 unique golf balls, and a special club per hole. There are Easter eggs oozing from each level. Can you find the skeletons, bananas, and shrunken heads? It is ideal for family fun. We play with a full loddy of 8 almost everyday. Keep up the good work.
Love it! I have it on the PS5 as well and prefer this version the most. Also love the iOS version.
